hero.name: Komla Etonam Georges EKLOU
hero.bio: Computer Science graduate from {university} specializing in {focus}. I build full-stack applications, decentralized integrations, and polished interfaces — currently contributing to the {company} development team in Lomé, Togo.
hero.tagline: I enjoy turning complex ideas into clean, reliable products at the intersection of web, blockchain, and user experience.

about.heading: Rigor, curiosity, and attention to detail.
about.p1: With a {degree} (application development specialization), I build web and Web3 applications with Vue, Nuxt, and React. I currently contribute to the {company} development team.
about.p2: I'm now looking to expand into {devops}, cloud, and cybersecurity (SysOps / SecOps).
